title: brachypodium × loliaceum
intro: Brachypodium × loliaceum, also known as false brome, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Poaceae family, often found in meadows and grasslands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium × loliaceum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Brachypodium × loliaceum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing its leaves and stems.
